core_mechanism: a scale-invariant multiplicative stochastic (random-growth) process on many interacting units with conservative redistributive coupling, whose steady state is a power-law (Pareto) distribution and which undergoes a condensation transition separating a broadly-spread phase from one where a finite fraction localizes on a few units
brief_reason: The abstract builds an evolution equation combining random multiplicative ('speculative') growth with exchange coupling that is invariant under an arbitrary rescaling of units, yielding a Pareto power-law wealth distribution and a transition between an even spread and domination by a few individuals.
